title: oVirt / RHV Storage Pool Manager (SPM) Host Missing or Contended
dataSources: `index=virtualization` `sourcetype="ovirt:spm"` from REST poll of `/api/hosts` and `/api/storagedomains` with fields `spm_host_id`, `storage_domain`, `spm_status`
app: Custom scripted input (oVirt REST API), `Splunk_TA_nix` on Engine for supplemental logs
spl:
index=virtualization sourcetype="ovirt:spm" earliest=-15m
| stats latest(spm_host_id) as spm_host, latest(spm_status) as spm_st by storage_domain
| where isnull(spm_host) OR lower(spm_st)!="ok"
| eval issue=case(isnull(spm_host), "No SPM host", like(lower(spm_st), "%contend%"), "SPM contention", 1==1, "SPM status " . spm_st)
| table storage_domain, spm_host, spm_st, issue
description: Only one host should hold SPM for a block/File domain at a time. Loss of SPM blocks LUN operations, snapshot merges, and template imports. Contention or a missing SPM row in API snapshots is a production-impacting condition.
value: Prevents storage-domain-wide freezes in oVirt/RHV by detecting SPM election problems before operators notice stuck disk tasks.
implementation: Poll storage domains and hosts every 60s. Map `storage_domain.spm_vds_id` (field names vary by API version) into `spm_host_id`. Alert when expected SPM is null or when monitoring shows repeated SPM moves. Correlate with SAN paths and VDSM logs on the candidate hosts.
visualization: Table (domains without SPM), Timeline (SPM moves), Single value (domains in contention).
